titleStmt.title: SII 10.398: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 398. (A.R. No. 194 of 1905.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA RIGHT OF THE ENTRANCE IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MĀRKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 11[8]3. (Durmati) (2nd year of Rudradēva-Mahārāja)

summary.p: Damaged. States that a general of Rudradēva-Mahārāja (the name of the general is missing) gave 50 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntakadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīsamastabhuvanapraśastavibhava cāḷukyavaṁśōdbhava pratāpaparimṛṣṭaripuyuvatīmukhati
laka cāḷukyakulatilaka vividhanītipārāyaṇa cāḷukyanārāyaṇa sāṁparāyasaṁda¨rśitaripu
kavaṁdatāṁḍava gōdāvarītīra samaragāṁḍiva bhaṁḍanabhīma bhuvanābhirāma maṁḍalikabhaya
daprayāṇabhērīrava pratibhaṭabhairava Asahāyaśūra manyebēṁṭakāragoṁḍa nātha dēvatala
goṁḍugaṁḍa riputimiramā¨rttaṁḍa niraṁtararakṣitā¨rtthisā¨rtthakaliṁgamaṁḍalika dāḍisē
[tā ?] yikuvaru toṁḍapoḍirāyakuvarupaṭṭighōṇamalli kākatīyagaṇapatidēvamahārāja di
vyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka parabalasādhaka paramamāhēśvara pratāpalaṁkēśvara samaramukha
nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmatu sakalasēnādhipati padasāhiṇipadirimu ppa
śrīmatu rudradēvamaharājula divyarājyasaṁvatsaramulu 2 Agu srāhi śakava¨rṣaṁ
bulu 1183 Agunēṁṭi du¨rmmatisaṁvatsara kā rttika śu 15 ma .
hākā¨rttikapa¨rvanimittamuna śrīpa¨rvatabūṣaṇa śrītripurāṁtakadēvaraku Aṁkhaḍadīpā
naku Iccinapanulu 50 Ivi mahādēvara lu .
Digital edition of SII 10.398 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
